facts.claim: Official Codex documentation describes codex exec as the non-interactive invocation surface and CODEX_HOME as the user state root.
The implementation environment reported codex-cli 0.128.0 and did not expose a plugin add subcommand.
Exact current discovery, precedence, headless invocation, and teardown contracts for non-Codex hosts are not verified.
Availability and billing status of every declared native runner label is decided only by the actual workflow run.
Live model, pricing, retention, region, and response-field availability are provider-account facts and are not established by repository fixtures.
Marketplace approval, delivery, update cadence, and public adoption remain external facts until observed for the exact package.
